sections.paragraph:
verb לרדת

to go down, descend, drop; get off someone's back

verb לרדת

to come down on

verb לרדת

to decline, decrease, deteriorate

verb לרדת

to immigrate (from Israel)

verb לרדות

to rule over; tyrannize; subjugate; punish

verb הורד

be brought down, lowered; reduced; removed
